name: Vegetable-Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the beef in a 9-inch square microwave-safe baking dish and sprinkle with garlic.
2. Cover; microwave on High for 3 minutes.
3. Cut zucchini lengthwise and then crosswise into 1/4-inch slices.
4. Add zucchini, onion, tomatoes, rice, soy sauce, basil, and 1/2 cup water to the beef in the baking dish.
5. Stir to combine everything.
6. Cover and microwave on High for 27 minutes, or until the rice is tender. Stir frequently.
